title: AlgoForge-2.0
description: Advanced algorithm visualizer and learning platform.
longDescription: Helping developers understand complex DSA concepts through visual interaction. Built for students to seamlessly grasp algorithmic flow and data structures.
highlights: Visualized multiple complex sorting and pathfinding algorithms
Interactive controls for playing, pausing, and stepping through execution

title: FoodNest
description: A smart food discovery platform. Discover Food, Not Just Locations.
longDescription: Smart filters, mood-based discovery (Chill Cafe, Date Night, etc.), and curated top picks built for rapid and relevant food exploration.
highlights: Sleek intuitive UI for rapid exploration of nearby eateries

title: ViTravelBuddy
description: AI-powered travel companion for seamless journey planning.
longDescription: Intelligent travel planner focusing on AI integration for real-time recommendations, UX, and efficient itinerary building.
highlights: Generated personalized itineraries based on user preferences
Integrated AI for smart routing and destination suggestions

title: Developer Portfolio
description: A clean, high-contrast design experiment in Neo-Brutalism.
longDescription: A personal portfolio built to break away from safe conventions. Features a custom brutalist design system, interactive arcade games, and dynamic animations.
highlights: Designed a custom Neo-Brutalist design system with high contrast and bold typography
Integrated interactive playground elements including classic arcade games

title: MindCare
description: A supportive platform for student mental well-being.
longDescription: Built during the Smart India Hackathon to solve real-world student stressors based on actionable insights and supportive community features.
highlights: Developed during the intensive Smart India Hackathon
Designed specifically for student-centric mental health support
